benefits.description: Noticeably more vascular appearance; people have commented on visible veins. Also ran a prior cycle in 2025 with the same observation.
Body fat at the lowest it has ever been, though user attributes increased vascularity primarily to this rather than the peptide

protocol_notes: User ran the peptide for 2 months in the current cycle and also for a few months back in 2025. Also using 'other compounds' concurrently. Cannot confirm whether the vascularity is from the peptide or reduced body fat. Specific peptide name not stated but context strongly implies BPC/TB stack being discussed in the thread.
